products.name: Deadpool 3 S.H.Figuarts Action Figure Wolverine 16 cm
products.description: This detailed action figure from Tamashii Nations' "S.H.Figuarts" series comes with "Deadpool 3". It is approx. 16 cm tall and comes with accessories in a window box.

products.name: Bandai S.H.Figuarts Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse Miles Morales Action Figure
products.description: Miles Morales, protagonist of "Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse," joins S.H.Figuarts! Two expressions, numerous web options, and dynamic action posability put you right in the drama! [Set Contents]Main Body, Four pairs of optional hands, Optional set of eyes, Two optional heads, Optional neck part, Three types of spider webs (long, medium, short), Tamashii STAGE stand

products.name: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Spider-Gwen 15 cm
products.description:
Alternate versions of Spider-Man assemble once again in the 2023 movie, "Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse". One of the film's heroes, Spider-Gwen, Miles Morales is now a figure, clade in his latest costume! The model features gorgeous specifications with expressive interchangeable eye parts, maskless faces, and a dedicated pedestal!

Contents

- Main unit
- 4 pairs of interchangeable hands
- 2 interchangeable maskless heads
- Interchangeable head
- Interchangeable hood
- 3 types of webbing (long, medium, short)
- TAMASHII STAGE set

products.name: Venom: The Last Dance S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Venom 19 cm
products.description:
From ´Venom: The Last Dance' comes this great and fully articulated action figure from Tamashii Nations' 'S.H. Figuarts' series.

The figure is approx. 19 cm tall and comes with additional accessories in a window box.

products.name: Super Mario RPG - Nintendo Switch
products.description: Team up with an oddball group of heroes to save Star Road and stop the troublemaking Smithy Gang in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch. This colorful RPG has updated graphics and cinematics that add even more charm to the unexpected alliance between Mario, Bowser, Peach, and original characters Mallow and Geno Enter (or revisit) this world of eccentric allies and offbeat enemies in an RPG for everyone.

products.name: Sony Stick Module for PlayStation 5 DualSense Edge Wireless Controllers
products.description: Maintain your DualSense Edge wireless controller’s great performance with this replacement DualSense Edge stick module. Aim and move with precision by swapping in fresh stick modules so you’re always playing with equipment that’s in great shape.

products.name: Nintendo Switch OLED with Blue and Red Joy-Con
products.description: Play at home on the TV or on-the-go with a vibrant 7-inch OLED screen with the Nintendo Switch OLED console. In addition to a new screen with vivid colors and sharp contrast, the Nintendo Switch (OLED model) includes a wide adjustable stand for more comfortable viewing angles, a dock with a wired LAN port for TV mode (LAN cable sold separately), 64GB of internal storage, and enhanced audio in Handheld and Tabletop modes using the system’s speakers. Features neon red and neon blue Joy-Con controllers, a black console, and a black dock. Enjoy immersive gameplay with the Nintendo Switch™ (OLED model) w/ Neon Red & Neon Blue Joy-Con™ controllers.

products.name: Sony PlayStation 5 Pro Console
products.description: Immerse yourself in the next generation of gaming with the PlayStation 5 Pro console, a revolutionary device that redefines what it means to play. With its cutting-edge technology, the PS5 Pro delivers breathtaking graphics through advanced ray tracing, ensuring that every shadow and reflection is rendered with stunning realism. The PS5 Pro game runs not only enhances graphics but also boosts performance, delivering a gaming experience that surpasses the standard PS5. Experience your favorite games in crystal-clear 4K resolution, optimized for high frame rate gameplay that keeps you at the edge of your seat.

products.name: Sony PULSE 3D Wireless Gaming Headset for PlayStation 5
products.description: Immerse yourself into your favorite content with the PS5 PULSE 3D Wireless Gaming Headset. Enjoy a seamless, wireless experience with a headset crafted for 3D on PS5™ consoles. This PS5 headset features a new sleek look, noise-cancelling microphones, and easy access controls. Whether you’re playing games or live streaming with these wireless PS5 headphones quality audio is delivered.

products.name: Sony DUALSHOCK 4 Wireless Controller for PlayStation 4 - Glacier White
products.description: Experience the power of gaming at your fingertips with this PS4 DualShock 4 Controller. This PS4 controller enhances your gaming experience. With revolutionary features and comfort with intuitive, precision controls you can fully experience your favorite video games.  The analog sticks and trigger buttons deliver greater response and sensitivity along with a multi touch pad for a more natural gameplay.

products.name: Sony DualSense Edge Wireless Controller for PlayStation 5
products.description: Perfect Your Gameplay with the PS5 DualSense Edge Controller. Get an edge in gameplay by creating your own custom controls to fit your playstyle. Built with high performance and personalization in mind, the new PS5 controller invites players to craft their own unique gaming experience to suit their playstyle.

products.name: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe - Nintendo Switch
products.description: Hit the road with the definitive version of Mario Kart 8 and play anytime, any-where! Race your friends or battle them in a revised battle mode on new and returning battle courses. Play locally in up to 4-player multiplayer in 1080p while playing in TV Mode. Every track from the Wii U version, including DLC, makes a glorious return. Plus, the Inklings appear as all-new guest characters, along with returning favorites, such as King Boo, Dry Bones, and Bowser Jr.!

products.name: Ultra Pro 2.5x3.5 Trading Card Penny Sleeves
products.description: Ultra PRO's original clear Soft Trading Card Penny Sleeves® are made with non-PVC, archival safe, and acid-free polypropylene film. These sleeves protect your valuable trading cards and collectible game cards from dust, dirt, and natural oils from your hands during handling and storage of the cards. Designed to hold standard size (2-1/2" X 3-1/2") trading cards up to 35 points in thickness, these sleeves also minimize surface scratches on your cards during sorting, display, or, for gaming cards, during gameplay.

products.name: Gran Turismo 6 - PlayStation 3
products.description: The next stage in the evolution of the world's most popular and comprehensive racing simulator is upon us. Gran Turismo 6, the latest installment in the highest-selling series, will reach stores this Holiday season. Known for blurring the lines between virtual and reality, the Gran Turismo series has revolutionized the racing genre in the last 15 years, allowing fans to drive the most prolific collection of cars on the world's most legendary racetracks. Gran Turismo 6 takes the real driving simulator experience to a whole new level.

products.name: Tony Hawk's Project 8 - PlayStation 3
products.description:
Tony Hawk's Project 8 immerses players in the definitive skateboarding experience using ultra realistic graphics, enhanced physics, and extremley responsive controls that simulate the feeling of skating with every trick and bail.

The game challenges players to experience the intensity and pressure of skating against some of the world's top pros in true to life competitions as they aim to become the #1 skater.

With an entirely new gameplay engine, the trick-based gameplay features amazing, detailed character animations that react realistically on and off their boards, a new physics system, an innovative bail mode, and the ability to move ramps and rails throughout the city.

The experience is so real, you don't just skate it, you feel it.

products.name: Microsoft Xbox One 500GB Console Black with 3.5mm Jack Controller
products.description: Games, Entertainment, and TV, all in one. Cutting-edge design meets cutting-edge technology with the XBox One console. By continuously adding features, content, and capabilities, Xbox One was built to grow with you. Updates from Xbox Live will happen in the background while you enjoy your favorite game. Sign in to any Xbox One to see your home screen and play your digital games. Your digital content, profile, and saves go where you go. Xbox One was built by gamers, for gamers.

products.name: Sony DualSense Wireless Controller for PlayStation 5 - Chroma Teal
products.description: Discover a deeper, highly immersive gaming experience1 that brings the action to life in the palms of your hands. The DualSense wireless controller Chroma Collection offers immersive haptic feedback, dynamic adaptive triggers2 and a built-in microphone, all integrated into an iconic comfortable design.

products.name: MLB The Show 25 Day 1 Edition - PlayStation 5
products.description: Forge your baseball dreams in MLB® The Show™ 25: The definitive baseball journey, powered by you. Ignite your passion and build your very own path to greatness—from high school all the way to the Hall of Fame! Along the way, connect with iconic baseball stars in fan-favorite modes – updated with new ways to play. This lovingly crafted entry in the series comes complete with a suite of gameplay and quality of life enhancements – designed to get you to the action faster.

products.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition - Nintendo Switch
products.description: Revive humanity on the enigmatic planet Mira in this thrilling action RPG. Set in 2054, after Earth has been ravaged by an intergalactic conflict between alien factions, the remnants of humanity find themselves on the brink of extinction. As a member of BLADE aboard the USS White Whale, you must navigate the wild expanses of Mira and lead the charge to restore civilization, utilizing formidable giant robots known as Skells to aid your quest.

products.name: Dragon Ball Ichibansho Masterlise PVC Statue Super Baby 2 (VS Omnibus Ultimate) 26 cm
products.description: From Bandai's "Ichibansho"- series comes this officially licensed PVC statue. It stands approx. 26 cm tall and comes in a closed box.

products.name: Bandai Spirits Dragon Ball Z Ichibansho Gohan (Childhood) TBA Snap Collection Figure GameStop Exclusive
products.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release Son Gohan -Childhood-(TBA) (Snap Collection)! Standing at approximately 7.1" tall, Gohan is seen in their popular pose. Be sure to collect this and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho figures! Masterlise Figures are Ichibansho's premiere statue line featuring a larger size compared to other figures and high-quality detail. This line is truly a masterpiece for fans to collect!

products.name: Bandai Namco Dragon Ball Super - Super Saiyan Blue Goku Action Figure
products.description: This highly sought after collection lets you step into the world of Dragon Ball with Super Saiyan Blue Goku where your imagination can be the star of the action. Each figure comes with its own unique power up accessories that lets you control the action like never before! Collectible packaging is the perfect way to show your love for Dragon Ball. Re-create your favorite action packed moments with 3 accessories to choose from. 16 points of articulation with the Dragon Stars figures you know and love.

products.name: Dragon Ball Ichibansho Masterlise PVC Statue Super Vegito (VS Omnibus Ultimate) 26 cm
products.description: From Bandai's "Ichibansho"- series comes this officially licensed PVC statue. It stands approx. 26 cm tall and comes in a closed box.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Match Makers PVC Statue Super Saiyan Son Gohan 10 cm
products.description: From Banpresto's "Match Makers" series comes this PVC statue. It stands approx. 10 cm tall.

products.name: Banpresto Dragon Ball Z GxMateria Majin Buu 8.3-in Action Figure
products.description: Majin Buu is the main antagonist of the Majin Buu Saga in the popular anime series, Dragon Ball Z. Majin Buu is an evil entity who has existed since Time Immemorial. Majin Buu cycles between going on rampages and long hibernations where he has absorbed the evil elements of mankind becoming steadily more violent and evil.

products.name: Banpresto Dragon Ball Super Match Makers Beerus VS Super Saiyan God Goku 5.9-In Figure
products.description: Beerus also known as the God of Destruction of Universe 7 from the poplar anime series, Dragon Ball Z. His job is to maintain the balance of the universe by destroying planets and is very indifferent about death to the point, he doesn’t care about the billions of lives he has taken.

products.name: Bandai Spirits Masterlise Dragon Ball Daima Son Goku (Mini) 3.9-in Ichibansho Figure
products.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release Son Goku (mini) (TBA)! Standing at approximately 3.9" tall, Son Goku (mini) is seen in their popular pose. Be sure to collect this and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho figures! Masterlise Figures are Ichibansho's premiere statue line featuring a larger size compared to other figures and high-quality detail. This line is truly a masterpiece for fans to collect!

products.name: Hot Toys Netflix One Piece - Roronoa Zoro
products.description:
The 1/6th scale Rorona Zoro Collectible Figure specially features:
- Authentic and detailed likeness of Mackenyu as Roronoa Zoro in One Piece
- One (1) newly developed head sculpt
- One (1) newly developed head sculpt with hair tied back in a black bandana, a sword in his mouth
- Both head sculpts have separate rolling eyeball function
- Highly-accurate facial expression with detail skin texture
- Detailed short green hair sculpture
- Approximately 31.5cm tall
- Newly developed body with over 30 points of articulations
- Six (6) pieces of interchangeable hands including:
- One (1) pair of sword holding hands
- One (1) pair of fists
- One (1) pair of relax hands
- Each piece of head sculpt is specially hand-printed
Costume:
- One (1) white colored robe
- One (1) belt with sword scabbards
- One (1) pair of black colored pants
- One (1) pair of black colored boots
Weapons:
- One (1) sword with white handle
- Two (2) swords with black handle
Accessories:
- One (1) tied black bandana (attachable to left arm)
- Specially designed figure stand with character nameplate
*Prototype shown, final product may be slightly different
**Product details can subject to change without further notice
© Eiichiro Oda/SHUEISHA
© Netflix/Tomorrow
© 2023 Hot Toys Limited. All Rights Reserved.
